detectors.description:
Reentrancy in ProofOfWoof._transfer(address,address,uint256) (ProofOfWoof.sol#705-823):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (ProofOfWoof.sol#769)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (ProofOfWoof.sol#837-849)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (ProofOfWoof.sol#775)
		- _developmentAddress.transfer(amount.div(2)) (ProofOfWoof.sol#857)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount.div(2)) (ProofOfWoof.sol#859)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (ProofOfWoof.sol#821)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (ProofOfWoof.sol#985)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (ProofOfWoof.sol#965)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (ProofOfWoof.sol#967)
	ProofOfWoof._rOwned (ProofOfWoof.sol#351) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ProofOfWoof._takeTeam(uint256) (ProofOfWoof.sol#979-987)
	- ProofOfWoof._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (ProofOfWoof.sol#939-975)
	- ProofOfWoof.balanceOf(address) (ProofOfWoof.sol#531-535)
	- ProofOfWoof.constructor() (ProofOfWoof.sol#441-495)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (ProofOfWoof.sol#821)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (ProofOfWoof.sol#993)
	ProofOfWoof._rTotal (ProofOfWoof.sol#363) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ProofOfWoof._getCurrentSupply() (ProofOfWoof.sol#1143-1155)
	- ProofOfWoof._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (ProofOfWoof.sol#991-997)
	- ProofOfWoof.constructor() (ProofOfWoof.sol#441-495)
	- ProofOfWoof.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (ProofOfWoof.sol#627-649)

	- [ProofOfWoof._transferStandard(address,address,uint256)](ProofOfWoof.sol#L939-L975)

	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](ProofOfWoof.sol#L821)

	[ProofOfWoof._rTotal](ProofOfWoof.sol#L363) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [ProofOfWoof._getCurrentSupply()](ProofOfWoof.sol#L1143-L1155)
	- [ProofOfWoof._reflectFee(uint256,uint256)](ProofOfWoof.sol#L991-L997)
